channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Tells Fed Chair Warsh: "Don't Look at Me"
item.description: The Warsh era begins with soaring inflation, an energy shock from the Middle East, and skepticism from colleagues about rate cuts.

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard steps down as director of national intelligence
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, President Trump's intelligence chief, announced her resignation on Friday.

item.title: Pakistani field marshal visits Tehran to help finalize U.S.-Iran deal
item.description: Pakistan's top military commander arrived in Tehran on Friday to mediate a potential agreement between the U.S. and Iran.

item.title: Mike Johnson increasingly bypassed as speaker by House members
item.description: Lawmakers from both parties are using discharge petitions more often to circumvent Speaker Mike Johnson and advance bills he opposes.
